caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, white headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold letters sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a dark desk with a professional microphone on a boom arm in front of him. To his right, a black mug with red and white text that reads "THE TALK OUT" is visible. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a repeating logo with five stars and the words "UNICORN HUSTLE," and a blue sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". In the background, a black office chair and other studio equipment are partially visible. Across the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, leaning slightly forward with his hands clasped near the microphone, subtly shifting his facial expression while appearing to speak.
